themes.label: Brokerage Charges
themes.description: Users are unhappy with the high brokerage charges and fees associated with the app.
representativeQuotes: Ya app bahut jada brokerage charges lata ha.
high brokerage fees....more than half the profit we make...ridiculous
DP charges are high and For investors - brokerage on equity delivery!!
themes.actionInsight: The product team should review and optimize the brokerage charges and fees to make them more competitive and transparent.

themes.label: App Stability
themes.description: Users are experiencing issues with the app's stability, including crashes, lags, and failed page loads.
representativeQuotes: This app have high charges and when you try to talk to agent you will get no response . sometimes it hangs while placing order.
Last few months this app is unusable. every time page fail to load page fail to load even when there is good internet connection.
The app experienced a severe technical glitch during live trading, and customer support’s resolution process is completely unacceptable.
themes.actionInsight: The product team should prioritize fixing the app's stability issues to prevent user frustration and potential loss of business.

themes.label: Customer Support
themes.description: Users are unhappy with the quality of customer support, including unresponsive agents and unhelpful resolution processes.
representativeQuotes: This app have high charges and when you try to talk to agent you will get no response .
The app experienced a severe technical glitch during live trading, and customer support’s resolution process is completely unacceptable.

I bought an Aye Finance Ltd bond through Groww, but my payout has not been credited. Despite investing through their platform, Groww has refused to help and said I must deal directly with the RTA, offering no support.
themes.actionInsight: The product team should improve the customer support experience by providing more responsive and helpful agents, as well as streamlining the resolution process.

themes.label: Feature Requests
themes.description: Users are requesting new features, including international market access, stop-loss and target for GTT orders, and improved fund comparison tools.
representativeQuotes: hey team groww...I'm looking forward to see SLBM-stock lending and borrowing mechanism facility being implemented for users loke me ASAP.
good application but fund comparison is the worst one. please add something like overlap % companies, last 5yr return reason etc if possible.
Please add Telugu language support to the Groww app.
themes.actionInsight: The product team should prioritize feature requests based on user demand and feasibility, and provide regular updates on the development roadmap.

themes.label: User Experience
themes.description: Users are generally satisfied with the app's user experience, including its ease of use and intuitive interface.
representativeQuotes: This app is nice investing in stocks, bonds mutual funds and other investment avenues. The facilities are convenient and user friendly.
very user friendly & gives all informative technical data to analyze investments
I have had a very good experience using Groww. The app is simple, user-friendly, and makes investing in stocks, mutual funds, and other financial products easy, even for beginners.
themes.actionInsight: The product team should continue to refine and improve the user experience, including simplifying the onboarding process and providing more educational resources for new users.
